steps.title: Find the requested row
steps.content: The question asks for a table entry. First find the row where the air temperature is $38^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Read the wind speed column
steps.content: In that row, move to the column for a wind speed of $60$ miles per hour. The table entry is $22^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Enter the number only
steps.content: The directions say to disregard the degree symbol when entering the response. The answer is 22.
